pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Java source and target version to 17 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation fails or produces incompatible bytecode if the source/target remains at 11 while running on JDK 17 with strict compiler settings or if new language features are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus version to a release compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Quarkus versions (2.4.1) may not support Java 17 features or may have runtime incompatibilities with JDK 17.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the base Docker image from Eclipse Temurin 11 to Eclipse Temurin 17 to align with the JDK 17 migration.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.why_exists: The application is being migrated to JDK 17; running on a JDK 11 base image would result in version mismatch or failure to utilize JDK 17 features/optimizations.
